observation_tips.zh-CN: 黎明黄昏更易遇见；保持安静，勿追逐
observation_tips.en: More active at dawn and dusk; stay quiet and do not chase

notes.zh-CN: 试点百科物种：未通过识别黄金集认证前不可捕获或发奖
notes.en: Pilot encyclopedia species: not capturable or rewardable until recognition-certified

zh-CN.blurb: 第四物种试点：仅百科展示
zh-CN.certification_note: 待黄金集认证后方可开放识别捕获

en.certification_note: Capture unlocks only after golden-set certification
